# Implementation Supervisor Bootstrap Template

> **Instructions:** Copy this template and fill in the bracketed fields to prepare a sprint for an IDE Agent or implementer.

---

## Approved Design Summary

**Artifact:** [e.g., Artifact 07 — GitHub Repo Steward Agent]
**Sprint:** [e.g., A7.1 — Foundation Scaffold]
**Approved by:** [Design Supervisor name/session]
**Approval date:** [date]

**Design summary:**

[Brief summary of the approved design for this sprint. Reference the design document or completion report.]

[One-sentence sprint goal.]

## Completion Report Requirements

The completion report must include:

- [ ] Branch and commit
- [ ] Files created/modified list
- [ ] Test results
- [ ] Lint results
- [ ] Safety scan results
- [ ] Scope confirmation (what was not changed)
- [ ] Known limitations
- [ ] Recommended next step
- [ ] [additional sprint-specific requirements]
